title: PostMyGig - Freelance Gig Sharing Platform
description: Built a platform where freelancers can post extra work they can’t handle and other freelancers can discover and take those gigs.
I designed the full flow where a freelancer posts a gig, other users browse and apply, and the owner can shortlist and connect with them.
I built a real-time chat system using WebSockets (Socket.IO) with a separate Node.js backend, allowing freelancers to communicate instantly.
I handled chat events, connections, and messaging flow between users in real time.
I built a Community and Activity feature to show platform activity like users posting gigs, hiring, and interacting, helping build trust and engagement.
I implemented email notifications using Resend for user actions like applications and interactions.
I developed both frontend and backend using Next.js and Node.js, and designed database structure using MongoDB.
I used Redis to improve performance and speed up frequently accessed data.
Worked across the full stack to connect gig posting, real-time chat, activity tracking, and notifications into a single platform.

title: CodeX - Cloud IDE
description: Built a cloud-based IDE similar to Replit where users can write, edit, and run code directly in the browser.
I integrated Monaco Editor to provide a VS Code-like coding experience with syntax highlighting and multi-language support.
I implemented code execution using Piston API, allowing users to run code securely in multiple languages.
I built a file management system using Supabase where users can create, edit, and manage project files.
I developed an AI code assistant that helps users debug code, suggest improvements, and understand code using file context.
I added AI-based code suggestions and autocomplete that adapts based on the current code.
I built a code converter feature that translates code between different programming languages while keeping functionality intact.
I implemented rate limiting using Redis and MongoDB to control API usage and prevent abuse.
I used Redis for caching to improve performance and reduce repeated API calls.
I handled both frontend and backend using Next.js API routes and managed state using Zustand.
I focused on building a smooth and responsive UI using Tailwind CSS and Shadcn components.

title: BuildMyCV - AI Resume Builder
description: Built BuildMyCV as a personal project, which was later acquired and extended in collaboration with the owner of Dignify A Girl.
Initially developed core features including AI resume builder, job description analysis, and an AI assistant to help users improve their resumes.
I built a resume builder where users can generate and edit resumes using AI in an interactive interface.
I implemented a feature where users can upload their resume along with a job description, and the system analyzes how well the resume matches the job.
I built an AI assistant that answers questions based on the user’s resume and suggests improvements.
After the project was taken forward, I worked on adding more features like job recommendations based on user profiles.
I integrated Stripe payments to support subscription-based access and premium features.
I worked on AI flows using LangChain and Gemini AI to generate structured outputs for resumes and analysis.
I used Firebase for storing user data and resume-related information and handled both frontend and backend using Next.js and Node.js.
Worked across the full stack to connect AI features, payments, and user workflows into a complete product.

title: Interview Buddy - AI Interview Prep
description: Built an AI-powered interview preparation platform where users can practice different types of interview questions based on role and difficulty.
I developed a system where users can generate role-specific questions (e.g., frontend, backend, system design) with adjustable difficulty levels.
I built support for multiple interview types including technical, behavioral, and HR rounds.
I implemented AI-generated answers with structured explanations to help users understand concepts clearly.
I added support for multiple programming languages, allowing users to practice language-specific questions.
I designed the UI to provide a smooth flow between different interview rounds and questions.
I worked on AI flows using LangChain and Gemini AI to generate relevant questions and detailed responses.
I focused on building a clean and interactive interface using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn components.
